content.en:
"With these purple-gold liquid substances, I should be able to break a lot of control chains, and my strength will definitely increase a bit. "

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Subsequently, Ye Tian continued to look for resources and perfect treasures in the Zhendao Alien Realm.

Even in the Zhendao Alien Realm, the perfect treasure is still very rare, so Ye Tian has been looking for a long time, but he has not found a perfect treasure.

However, as time passed, Ye Tian found a lot of resources.

this day.

Ye Tian was looking for resources, and suddenly sensed a strong aura.

This aura contains an incomparably terrifying edge power.

"Perfect Treasure!"

Ye Tian looked pleasantly surprised.

After looking for so long, I finally found a perfect treasure.

Wow!

Ye Tianshi's shadow passed in an instant.

Soon.

Ye Tian saw a perfect treasure, it was a knife, this knife exuded many changes in the knife path, cutting time and space, making people dare not touch it.

At this moment, even if he was a Ten Realms level master, if he dared to touch this knife, he would be bombarded into nothingness by the power of this perfect treasure in an instant.

Ye Tian approached the knife and sensed its aura.

"It's a low-grade perfect treasure!"

Ye Tian judged it.

Although it is only a low-grade perfect treasure, its value is still unimaginable!

Moreover, such a low-level perfect treasure is also suitable for Ye Tian to use the top-level perfect control technique Ten Thousand Dao Blade.

However, if you want to take away the Perfect Treasure, you must master the corresponding Dao Change Mark, and if you master the Perfect Mark, you can naturally take it away instantly.

Although Ye Tian did not master the perfect mark of the way of the sword, he had also mastered more than a billion kinds of changes and mastered the mark of change, so he could still take this perfect treasure.

Airplanes!

Ye Tian's right hand was fused with the change mark of the sword, and many Dao changes emerged, grabbing this perfect treasure.

Bang!!!!

The power of the Perfect Treasure collided with the power of Ye Tian's Knife Change Mark, but under the guidance of the Knife Mark, it quickly suppressed the power of the Perfect Treasure.

A certain moment.

Ye Tian completely grasped the perfect treasure and held it firmly in his hands.

It didn't take long for Ye Tian to take initial control of this Perfect Treasure Knife and know its name.

"Bloody Blade!"

The power of the low-grade Alien Treasure Blood Blade Knife was terrifying, even if Ye Tian completely refined it in the future, he would not be able to completely control it, at most, he would use the Blood Blade Knife to burst out a terrifying blow, but after one blow, there was no way to use the Blood Blade Knife again.

"It is said that the lowest person who can really use the Perfect Treasure for regular combat is also the peak half-step Perfect Master!" Ye Tian muttered.

Although he can't completely use the Bloody Blade Knife now, he can at least use it as his hole card!

Subsequently.

Ye Tian continued to look for the Perfect Treasure and other resources.

Time passed slowly, and Ye Tian's harvest was getting more and more.

Before you know it, the day of leaving the town is getting closer and closer.

At this time, Ye Tian still wanted to get the second perfect treasure, but now it seems that there is not much hope.

Abrupt.

Ye Tian's copy body sensed a creature, this creature was called Wanyin Tianpeng, and the other party actually had two perfect-level ancestral endowments.

"Hey, there are even creatures with perfect-level ancestral endowments in the different realms of the town, what an unexpected joy!"

Ye Tian said with a smile.

These two Perfection-level Ancestral Endowments are Perfect-Grade Ancestral Endowment-Glacier and Perfect-Grade Ancestral Endowment-Exemption.

Binghe is a perfect ancestral endowment of the ice system, and immunity is a special talent, which can exempt damage from the body and transfer its damage to the surrounding time and space, so as to ensure that he will not suffer much damage.

The Ice River Perfect Grade Ancestral Endowment is relatively average, but it is very good to exempt the Perfect Grade Ancestral Endowment.

Immediately, Ye Tian copied these two perfect-level ancestral endowments.

"Something is wrong, this Wanyin Tianpeng's aura is too unstable, it is extremely powerful for a while, and it is very sluggish for a while, and it screams from time to time, this is wrong, could it be that it is injured?

Ye Tian was very curious, shuttled over, and investigated the situation of this Wanyin Tianpeng up close.

......

"Boom!"

This Wanyin Tianpeng sensed Ye Tian and killed Ye Tian.

The opponent's strength is very strong, no less than a top-notch perfect half-step perfect controller, but at this moment, under the injury, he can only exert the strength of an ordinary half-step perfect controller.

Thundered!!!

Ye Tian fought with this Wanyin Tianpeng and quickly discovered its clues.

"There is a situation in its body, it seems that some power is constantly destroying its body, and although it has been using the Immunity Perfection Grade Ancestral Endowment to transfer damage, it has not been able to recover. "

Ye Tian saw this, and immediately understood how terrifying the things in this Wanyin Tianpeng body were.

Since the opponent couldn't show his strength, Ye Tian easily crushed the opponent, and after fighting for a while, Ye Tian finally relied on the Blood Blade Knife to cast ten thousand blades and killed the opponent with one blow.

After all, the opponent's body is still comparable to the top half-step perfect controller, so it is still a little difficult to kill the opponent.

Otherwise, Ye Tian would not have used the Blood Blade Knife.

After using the Blood Blade Knife once, Ye Tian consumed a lot, but it was still worth it to kill the other party.

And after this Wanyin Tianpeng was killed, Ye Tian finally sensed the situation in the other party's body.

It was a white lotus flower, and its aura was incomparably terrifying, far surpassing the Blood Blade Knife.

"Perfect Treasure !!"

Ye Tian was taken aback, and it was not a low-grade perfect treasure, but a medium-grade perfect treasure.

Obviously, this Wanyin Tianpeng is not very intelligent, and he devoured this medium perfect treasure, but he couldn't withstand the power of the perfect treasure, so he was constantly hurt by the medium perfect treasure.

"Trouble, I can't take this perfect treasure!"

Ye Tian frowned.

This Perfect Treasure contains a change in the path of enlightenment, and if you want to take away a medium Perfect Treasure, you must at least master the Perfect Seal.

Of course, if one's cultivation has reached the peak half-step Perfect Controller realm, and then mastering the Enlightenment Dao Change Mark, one can also take this medium-level perfect treasure.

However, Ye Tian can't do it now.

Although he could go to the Enlightenment Path Transformation and strive to master the perfect imprint of the Enlightenment Path, it was too late, and he couldn't stay in the Realm for long.

After pondering for a while, Ye Tian finally thought of a solution.

"I can fuse the exempt perfect-level ancestral endowment, and then forcibly swallow this perfect treasure, with the exempt perfect-level ancestral endowment, I will not die. Then, I can take it out! Once I get out, I can slowly comprehend the changes in the path of cultivation and enlightenment, so that I can successfully refine and master this perfect treasure in the future!"

Ye Tian planned.

So, he began to fuse the Exemption Perfection-level Ancestral Fu.
